title: Ephemeral Generative Interface — Shared Database Schema v1
description: Contract-grade schema for Ephemeral Generative Interface (EGI) records. Defines the minimal field set, stimulus/reconstruction model, simplicial topology, persistence policy, and multi-sensory reactivation conditions. Ref: AEROSPACEMODEL-MCC-SPEC-008 §8

provenance.title: EGI Provenance
provenance.description: Origin metadata for the EGI record.

generating_model.description: Identifier of the model that created this interface.

validation_status.description: Validation state of the generated interface.

simplicial_signature.title: Simplicial Signature
simplicial_signature.description: Topological invariants of the interface complex.

max_dimension.description: Maximum simplex dimension in the complex.

betti_numbers.description: Betti numbers β₀, β₁, β₂, … characterising the complex topology.

mode.description: Reconstruction strategy: path (sequential), graph (relational), or hypergraph (higher-order).

channel_affinity.title: SENSORIUM Channel Affinity
channel_affinity.description: Per-channel reactivation probability aligned with the six SENSORIUM axes.

id.description: Unique EGI record identifier. Pattern: EGI-NNN (e.g. EGI-001).

status.description: Lifecycle status of the EGI record.

trigger_patterns.description: Sensory patterns that activate this interface.

activation_threshold.description: Minimum match score required to trigger activation.

seed_reference.description: URI pointing to the latent-space seed for reconstruction.

assembly_rules.description: Ordered steps to instantiate the interface from the seed.

store_full_interface.description: If false, only the seed and assembly rules are persisted.

residual_trace.description: If true, a lightweight fingerprint survives decay for future recognition.

decay_policy.description: Condition under which the interface is discarded.

cross_channel_boost.description: When true, co-occurring stimuli across channels multiply reactivation probability.

cross_model_compatibility.description: Whether the record is portable across different generating models. Recommended value: true.
